title: No Armor by Pwissh
description: A minecraft resource pack that hides the armor entities are wearing.
body:
A resource pack I created because one of my friends asked me to. It hides all sorts of armor on player both in inventory gui and in third person mode making every entity look like they don't wear any armor (mobs included). You can use this resource pack for relaxed times like when you want to take your armor off to chill with your pet but hesitate because protection decreases. Or don't want to look like you are wearing armor. If you aren't familiar with this type of stuff this is purely client side and won't be affecting other player visions. So it is %100 safe to use under any circumstances. This resource pack is currently only tried on 1.19 but I'm sure it should be okay to use in newer versions. Not so sure for the lower versions though. Other than that have fun with the resource pack. The pack.png file (the pack icon) is made by the talented artist "六華Forever9Nine". Go follow them since they are insanely talented and a very kind individual.

Also this pack has an overlay called "elytra overlay" which removes elytra from the player. You can still fly with it but it won't be shown in the third person mod or inventory gui. It also works with Optifine capes or Fabric's cape mods and compatible with all performance mods. But if you'll use it with optifine capes, you'll need the "CIT Resewn" mod since it replicates Optifine's "Custom Item Texture" feature and I used that to remove the elytra model. The pack.png file (the pack icon) is again made by "六華Forever9Nine" so enjoy.

Artist's personal website: https://forever9nine.carrd.co 

(Even though I called it an "overlay", which one is on top or bottom doesn't change anything)
